name: Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 2 Sprigs fresh thyme (OR ½ teaspoon Dried thyme)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the first amount of oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. When hot, add eggplant; cook, stirring constantly, for about 3 minutes until tender.
3. Transfer eggplant to a colander.
4. Next, cook zucchini in the skillet, stirring constantly, for about 3 minutes until tender.
5. Remove zucchini to the colander as well.
6. Add remaining oil to the skillet; sauté onion until clear.
7. Add green pepper and cook while stirring for about 3 minutes.
8. Stir in garlic, thyme (fresh or dried), and bay leaf.
9. Add the drained eggplant and zucchini back into the skillet.
10. Cook while stirring for about 5 minutes.
11. Add tomatoes; cover tightly and cook for 20 minutes until they break down.
12. Uncover and cook for an additional 10 minutes to reduce any liquid that has formed, if desired.
13. Serve hot or cold.
